sector_summary: The top sectors include Technology, Financials, Healthcare, and Biotech, all with medium confidence levels. Consumer Staples, Industrials, and Communication Services are sectors to avoid due to low confidence and negative price momentum, with notable conflicts in Consumer Discretionary and Clean Energy where price and news diverge.
